# Ledger of Ash — Upgrade Batch 22

This batch makes tangible runtime progress on three fronts:

- fixes real runtime data bugs in named-NPC placement and missing adjacent route destinations
- adds objective-web driven Stage III–V actions so late-game routes are less generic
- adds stricter build auditing in the Character and Map overlays

## Verified current scope in this overlay

- 31 archetypes
- 93 backgrounds
- 93 route signatures
- 30 locality projections
- Stage I rooted starts across the active background matrix
- central narrative panel
- typed journal and Hall of Legends continuity
- recruitable companions in active starting localities
- Stage I–IV rescue continuation
- Stage V permadeath shell
- bestiary and hazard hooks per locality and route
- expanded route adjacency graph scaffolding

## What Batch 22 adds

- objective-web action generation for Stage III–V families
- exact repair of the Toman placement reference in Aurora surfaces
- exact repair of the Neren placement key in Shelk surfaces
- missing route-destination coverage for Moonvault, Brasswake, and Pilgrim Scarp adjacency lanes
- stricter build audit counts surfaced in the runtime

## What it still does not claim

- full V28_8 named-NPC placement completion across every named NPC
- complete world route graph for every polity and route packet
- full authored Stage III–V content matrix for all 93 backgrounds
- backend authority / API stack
- final balance pass across all 20 levels / 5 stages

The dist/ folder mirrors the deployable output.
